title: 3 Photonics Companies Making Quantum Tech Possible
excerpt: Lumentum, IPG Photonics, and nLight have posted strong YTD gains and revenue growth as photonics demand rises for AI, with analysts largely bullish on furthe...
content_html:
Nathan Reiff, MarketBeat

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 9:35 AM PDT 4 min read

Key Points

  • Interested in Lumentum Holdings Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better.

  • Photonics technology is gaining investor attention for powering AI data throughput today and potentially quantum computing applications in the future.

  • Lumentum Holdings has doubled year to date and grew revenue nearly 90% year over year, though shares trade at a lofty valuation near 142x earnings.

  • Smaller peers IPG Photonics and nLight also posted strong growth and analyst optimism, though nLight remains pre-profit and more speculative with defense contract exposure.

All of a sudden, photonics seems to be one of the hottest fields among tech enthusiasts. Optical and photonics technology is massively important for AI applications that must field tremendous data throughput that exceeds the limits of traditional wiring. With photonics, data can be zipped through fiber-optic networks at far higher throughput than copper allows, with the added benefits of low latency and better energy efficiency.

Beyond its applications today, photonics may become even more important in the coming years. The reason for this is that many of the benefits that photonics technology provides to AI applications have the same value for quantum technology. For investors, an alternative to picking up pure-play quantum tech firms like IonQ Inc. (NYSE: IONQ)—even for all the many reasons these companies may appeal to those with a healthy appetite for risk—is to look at companies making photonics tools that could power next-gen quantum tech down the line.

→ Buyback Boom: These 3 Companies Are Betting Billions on Their Own Stocks

Lumentum's Major Rally May Pose Valuation Concerns, But Revenue Momentum Is Real

Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LITE) is a photonic technologies firm that got off to a strong start to the year and done a fairly good job of maintaining that momentum. Overall, LITE stock has doubled year to date (YTD), despite some horizontal trading in the last several months.

While the massive rally has not helped alleviate concerns about Lumentum's valuation—the firm currently trades at nearly 142x earnings—analysts are still largely optimistic about its prospects going forward. Two-thirds of the 21 analyst ratings for LITE shares are Buys, and Wall Street anticipates more than 32% more in possible upside to come.

→ 3 Photonics Companies Making Quantum Tech Possible

Lumentum's capacity to weather the storm in recent weeks, as AI stocks have taken a hit, is impressive but perhaps not surprising given the massive success the company has seen in recent periods. In the latest quarter, for example, Lumentum boosted revenue by about 90% year over year (YOY) to $808 million, with a strong non-GAAP operating margin coming in at 32.2% as well. Management expects another record quarter, with no signs of slowing sales momentum.

content_html_zh:
内森·雷夫，MarketBeat

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 9:35 阅读 4 分钟

要点

  • 对 Lumentum 控股公司感兴趣？ 这是我们更喜欢的五只股票。
  • 光子技术因其为当今的人工智能数据吞吐量和未来潜在的量子计算应用提供动力而受到投资者的关注。
  • Lumentum Holdings 今年迄今已实现翻倍增长，收入同比增长近 90%，但其股价估值接近市盈率 142 倍。
  • 较小的同行 IPG Photonics 和 nLight 也实现了强劲的增长和分析师的乐观态度，尽管 nLight 仍处于盈利前状态，并且在国防合同方面更具投机性。

突然之间，光子学似乎成为科技爱好者中最热门的领域之一。 光学和光子技术对于人工智能应用非常重要，这些应用必须提供超出传统布线限制的巨大数据吞吐量。 借助光子学，数据可以通过光纤网络以远高于铜缆的吞吐量传输，并具有低延迟和更高能源效率的额外优势。

除了当今的应用之外，光子学在未来几年可能会变得更加重要。 原因是光子技术为人工智能应用提供的许多好处对于量子技术具有相同的价值。 对于投资者来说，选择像 IonQ Inc.（纽约证券交易所股票代码：IONQ）这样的纯粹量子技术公司的另一种选择是关注那些生产可以为下一代量子技术提供动力的光子工具的公司，即使出于多种原因这些公司可能会吸引那些具有健康风险偏好的人。

→ 回购热潮：这 3 家公司在自己的股票上押注数十亿美元

Lumentum 的大幅上涨可能会引发估值担忧，但收入势头是真实的

Lumentum Holdings Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：LITE）是一家光子技术公司，今年开局强劲，并在保持这一势头方面做得相当不错。 总体而言，尽管过去几个月出现了一些横向交易，但今年迄今 (YTD)，LITE 股票已经翻了一番。

尽管大幅上涨并没有缓解人们对 Lumentum 估值的担忧（该公司目前的市盈率接近 142 倍），但分析师仍然对其未来前景持乐观态度。 21 名分析师对 LITE 股票的评级中有三分之二是买入，华尔街预计未来可能上涨超过 32%。

→ 3 家光子学公司使量子技术成为可能

最近几周，随着人工智能股票遭受重创，Lumentum 经受住风暴的能力令人印象深刻，但考虑到该公司最近取得的巨大成功，这也许并不令人意外。 例如，在最近一个季度，Lumentum 的收入同比增长约 90%，达到 8.08 亿美元，非 GAAP 运营利润率也高达 32.2%。 管理层预计本季度将再创历史新高，且销售势头没有放缓的迹象。
